name: Mohamed Masry

projects.name: Automatic E-Commerce AI System
projects.description: Built an LLM-based chatbot to understand user intent and perform actions such as product search and order queries.

projects.name: ETS: EEG-to-Text
projects.description: Developed a hybrid CNN–Transformer model to decode 128-channel EEG and eye-tracking signals into natural language text.

projects.name: Histology Cell-Type Prediction
projects.description: Developed a ConvNeXt-based pipeline to classify cell-type abundance in H&E-stained histology slides.

summary: AI Engineer with hands-on experience developing practical AI solutions across computer vision, natural language processing, and predictive modeling.
